projectDescription: Jinmi AI is an intelligent commerce ecosystem that helps businesses and individual entrepreneurs automate sales, customer service, and content creation with AI.
keyFeatures: AI-powered content creation (blogs, images, videos, scripts) with Jinmi Content Hub
Unified omnichannel inbox for Facebook, Zalo, Website, Email, and Telegram
24/7 AI chatbot for automated customer consultation and sales closing
Analytics & reporting for agent performance and channel comparison
AI CRM for 360° customer data and personalized campaigns
AI Call Center for large-scale outbound and inbound call automation
Free tools: Lead Generation, Fashion Studio AI, Pricing Calculator, Landing Page Generator
publicApiSurface: Jinmi Content Hub – text, image, video, and audio content generation
Jinmi Omnichannel – omnichannel inbox, AI chatbot, automations, analytics
Jinmi CRM – customer data management and segmentation
Jinmi AI Call Center – outbound/inbound call automation
Jinmi Ecommerce – multi-channel product and order management
Jinmi Gobox – fulfillment and warehouse management
